segment.source: A two-column section pairing a heading, rich-text intro, and a vertical list of feature points (title plus one-line detail) with a single side image. Use it for: document sections that explain one topic in prose and then enumerate supporting points, solution overviews accompanied by a screenshot or photo. Prefer 'Alternating Feature Section' for several text–image rows; use 'Split Text & Media' when there is prose but no point list.
